nasb.text: “In regard to all the things of which I am accused by the Jews, I consider myself fortunate, King Agrippa, that I am about to make my defense before you today;

esv.text: “I consider myself fortunate that it is before you, King Agrippa, I am going to make my defense today against all the accusations of the Jews,

cnv.text: “亞基帕王啊，猶太人控告我的事，今天我可以在你面前辯護，實在是萬幸；

ccb.text: “亚基帕王啊，面对犹太人对我的种种控告，我今天很荣幸可以在你面前申辩，

csbs.text: “阿格里帕王啊，关于犹太人控告我的一切事，今天要在您面前申辩，我认为自己是蒙福的，
